title: アナタの夢はなんですか！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending day after day chasing dreams with
Bamboo Memory, our first three years together
are coming to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this isn't the end of her dream chasing. In
fact, we've yet to even see a glimpse of the end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because as long as people hold dreams in their
hearts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they'll continue to talk about Bamboo
Memory's powerful running and how it shines light
upon everyone's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They've crossed the 600-meter mark and rounded
the final turn! Now they're onto the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O and Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo and Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
100 meters left! Here they come! And she's
crossed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wheeew! Now that's what I call a red-hot race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Indeed, my heart was aflutter the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno! You were even more powerful than usual
today!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you got something real good out of
that bout with your grandpa!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You might be right.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the day I managed to land a strike on
him, I've sensed a powerful strength dwelling
within me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget how warmly he smiled, or how
glad I felt hearing him praise my technique.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My next dream is to harness this sensation to
reach yet unknown heights in both my ability to
protect others... and my ability to run.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Let your guard down, and I'll leave you far behind
in my dust, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have it any other way! But I'll be right
there with you. No matter how strong you get, I'm
aiming to be even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That goes for me too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to bloom more magnificently than even the fullest bloom! I'll keep aiming for grander heights until I stand at the center of our generation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wow, listen to you, Chiyono O! You've been way
more fired up since you duked it out with
Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have! How could I not be now that I'm officially
her rival?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget what it felt like when she called
me her equal after our no-holds-barred race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Back then, I made up my mind to keep on
blooming beautifully, so that Maruzen and I can
have even more spectacular races in the future.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's my new dream!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And if I want to shine even brighter than
Maruzen, then I can't let any of you beat me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool! I could learn something from your
heartfelt passion!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I agree. As someone who has run together with all
of you, I also hope that we continue our rivalries.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're all so strong, passionate, and blindingly
bright. You've inspired me to follow your lead,
shine with my own light, and challenge the
destiny that awaits me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're racing Ramonu soon, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I still can't believe she acknowledged me as a
worthy opponent and took the trouble to
challenge me personally.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But I think that's the best proof there is that I,
Mejiro Ardan, have left a mark on the world that
only I could.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such, my current dream is to surpass the
brilliance of the Mejiro family's crown jewel and
reach yet unknown expanses.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: May we all realize our new dreams.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We're the ultimate generation—we got this in the
bag!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone is bursting with excitement to fulfill
their new dreams! I can't let them pass me by!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Besides, I've got a new dream of my own! I'm
gonna work with Trainer so that I can turn the
heat up even higher!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whatever happened to your dream, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back on a certain day some time ago,
during a brief lull between Bamboo Memory's
fiery races.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And now, the person you've all been waiting for!
It's the Best Sprinter winner herself—Bamboo
Memory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: EVERYONE! Thanks for coming to see me today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the racecourse is hosting an event to
commemorate Bamboo Memory's reception of the
URA award for Best Sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Fan A
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Bamboo Memory!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for always doing your best! Keep on
blazing ahead!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Bam-boo! Bam-boo! Bam-boo!
Bam-boo! Bam-boo! Bam-boo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
WHOOOAH! I can feel all the passion and energy
in your voices! It's giving me goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've invited Bamboo Memory and her
trainer to the stage, let's hear a few words! First,
I'd like to ask...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being surrounded by such an excited audience
has Bamboo Memory practically vibrating with
energy. Together, we say a few words for her
many fans.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And now, the moment you've all been waiting
for—we'd like to ask Bamboo Memory to run a lap
to commemorate this event!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I thought you'd never ask! Let's hurry up and hit
the track!
choice_data_list: It's just one lap, so give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'll be back in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory tears across the track and the
audience roars with enthusiasm. However, just as
she's about to reach the end of her loop...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory crosses the finish line but
doesn't slow down! Instead, she keeps on running!
choice_data_list: You only had to do one lap!
You only had to do one lap!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's this?! Bamboo Memory has started a
second loop around the track!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Keep it up, Bamboo Memory! There's nothing like
watching you run!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo, you're so cool! I'll be your fan forever
and ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I'm shocked by Bamboo Memory's
unexpected decision to keep running, her fans
love it. And so, the event ends as a great success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On our way back after the event...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry I pulled that little stunt earlier!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I just got so pumped up with everyone
cheering for me, I let my emotions get the better
of me...
choice_data_list: The fans really seemed to enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I know they did, but still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I looked toward the stands as she ran, and it was
clear that every one of her fans saw their very
own dreams reflected in her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her showstopping performances and drive to
change history lit up all of their dreams as well.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Until now, I've always run toward my own dreams.
I cheered everyone else on as they chased their
dreams too, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If my fans have come to see their own dreams
through me...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Then I couldn't be happier!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What's your dream right now?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Is it still training me into a strong Umamusume,
like you yelled at the sunset back then?
choice_data_list: That wish has already come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all of Bamboo Memory's persistence
and hard work, she now burns brightly as this
generation's best sprinter and miler.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She really did make my dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of races she's got in store for
us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like her fans, all the dreams I have came
about because of Bamboo Memory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I don't think I'd have any dreams
at all if it weren't for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to take on her dreams as my own, and
continue to help her realize those dreams.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then I guess that means I have to keep showing
you more dreams!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And not just you! I'll give all my fans and
everyone else in the world lots and lots of
passionate dreams!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm Bamboo Memory—the best of the
best...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And your dream!
